task_completion.description: The agent accesses the 'world_capitals' layer to find the coordinates for Nairobi and Addis Ababa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table or 'Identify Results' panel is open, showing the records and coordinates for Nairobi and Addis Ababa.

task_completion.description: The agent enables editing mode for the 'field_observations' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'field_observations' layer in the Layers panel has the pencil icon toggled on, indicating editing mode is active.

task_completion.description: The agent uses the tool to add a new point feature to the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add Point Feature' tool is selected in the toolbar, and the cursor is actively placing a point on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the name of the new feature to 'Relay Tower Alpha'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Feature Attributes dialog box is open for the new point, with 'Relay Tower Alpha' entered into the name field.

task_completion.description: The agent includes both 'Nairobi' and 'Addis Ababa' in the description field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Feature Attributes dialog box shows both 'Nairobi' and 'Addis Ababa' typed into the description or notes field.

task_completion.description: The new point feature is placed at the geographic midpoint between Nairobi and Addis Ababa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map canvas shows the newly created point feature located approximately halfway between Nairobi (Kenya) and Addis Ababa (Ethiopia).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GIS software menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes, without terminal windows executing spatial commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GIS application and layers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas, layer panel, and attribute dialogs are visible and actively used, rather than a text editor or database browser modifying the GPKG file directly.

integrity.description: The agent derived the coordinates from the provided layer rather than using external search or hardcoded scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen opening the attribute table or using the identify tool on the 'world_capitals' layer to read the coordinates before placing the new point.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target feature must be named exactly 'Relay Tower Alpha'. The description field must contain both 'Nairobi' and 'Addis Ababa'. The new point must be added to the 'field_observations' layer. The point must be located geographically halfway between Nairobi and Addis Ababa (within a tolerance of 0.5 degrees or ~60 km). The data source is 'world_survey.gpkg'.
